name: DeleteTableVersionRequest
description: DeleteTableVersionRequest schema from Amazon Glue API

allOf.description: The ID of the Data Catalog where the tables reside. If none is provided, the Amazon Web Services account ID is used by default.
The database in the catalog in which the table resides. For Hive compatibility, this name is entirely lowercase.
The name of the table. For Hive compatibility, this name is entirely lowercase.
The ID of the table version to be deleted. A VersionID is a string representation of an integer. Each version is incremented by 1.
